MIT LICENSE at repo root (Brandon Correa, 2026) + README license section; verified by host.
51-aircraft real capture committed-ready at test/resources/ with r_dst/r_dir redacted (verified 0 occurrences); all trap-table quirks confirmed or explicitly not-observed; no doc corrections needed.
Build surface + skeleton tree; all bb commands verified; CLAUDE.md corrected for test:cljs reality.

HTTP server implemented under src/clj/adsb/http/: reitit router with Malli coercion on /api/aircraft/:icao (garbage icao -> 400 in middleware, no keyword interning), schema-checked responses, /healthz with stubbed feeder-status, static serving of resources/public, and idempotent start!/stop! now booted by bb dev via the :dev alias. aircraft-detail reads an injected state-lookup defaulted to empty state (404s until adsb-nqf.2). bb test:clj and bb lint clean. Commit 3f1c071.

CLJS browser runner built and proven: shadow-cljs :test build + adsb.test-runner (registers tests via env/get-test-data, parks result on window), Playwright driver (script/run-browser-tests.mjs, self-serving on ephemeral port) mapping run to exit code; bb test:cljs runs the real headless-Chromium suite. Proof: clean suite exit 0 (17 passed); deliberate failing test exit 1; removal exit 0. RTL Reagent component + React event test and day8.re-frame.test app-db isolation test added. Docs corrected (runner registry step, r/flush spelling, React-18 async findBy, ephemeral-port driver) and CLAUDE.md line restored.
All doc files verified against reality; browser test runner proven.

App shell landed in commit f7a46a1: index.html + #app mount; core/init! boots re-frame (:app/initialize-db) and mounts a full-viewport MapLibre map under a placeholder header. Map init behind the fakeable adsb.map.maplibre seam (create!/destroy! protocol); no-token demo-tiles basemap for DEV (prod tiles = adsb-kh4.5) with attribution; privacy-safe fixed regional center [lon -82.0, lat 28.0] zoom 7, never the receiver. CLJS test (test/cljs/adsb/map/view_test.cljs) asserts center/zoom + token-free style and that the shell mounts + inits the map through the seam. Verified for real in headless Chromium via the now-landed adsb-4ga.8 runner: 8 tests / 17 assertions, 0 fail; lint clean; live-app smoke shows canvas + attribution, 0 page errors. bb dev serves the app on :8080 via shadow-cljs :dev-http.

Trust boundary landed in 734e46e. schema.cljc: raw-aircraft honoring reality (alt_baro number|"ground"|absent, nullable optionals, absent-stays-absent), domain aircraft schema, consolidated anchored case-insensitive icao-address (also fixes the unanchored routes.clj placeholder regex), and number-based plausibility limits as a separate layer. ingest/coerce.cljc: ->aircraft (keeps position-less aircraft, drops identity-less; trims callsigns, lower-cases hex, drops implausible FIELDS without clamping) and unkillable ->aircraft-batch (one bounded log line per reject, clj/cljs catch backstop). Comprehensive cljc tests incl. batch resilience with mangled/non-map entries, log-count + log-boundedness tests, and a whole-real-fixture test: 51/51 accepted, 39 positioned / 12 never-positioned retained, all domain-schema-valid. bb test:clj 103 assertions green, bb lint clean, browser suite 87 assertions green in headless Chromium. Never-positioned decision recorded on the bead and written into validation-boundaries.md + testing-standards cast.

Added .github/workflows/ci.yml: temurin 21 + setup-clojure (Clojure CLI + babashka) + Node 20, m2/gitlibs/npm/playwright caching, npm ci, playwright install chromium --with-deps, then bb lint + bb test on push to master and PR. CLJS suite runs in real headless Chromium via script/run-browser-tests.mjs (no jsdom). Workflow compiles the :app build before bb test because the JVM static-serving route test needs the gitignored resources/public/js/main.js. Verified locally against HEAD in a throwaway git worktree (bb lint clean; bb test = 9 clj/cljc + 17 cljs browser assertions, all pass once app compiled). actionlint 1.7.12 reports the YAML clean. NOT observed running on GitHub: I cannot push, so remote CI green is unproven. Commit 3c85e3b.

Built the six-member fixture cast in test/cljc/adsb/fixtures.cljc (raw + domain forms, domain derived through coerce/->aircraft) with tests in fixtures_test.cljc. bb test:clj and bb test:cljs green; both files lint clean. Commit 7e62287.

Implemented src/cljc/adsb/geo.cljc: pure bearing/distance(haversine, meters)/bounds + aircraft->feature and aircraft-picture->feature-collection GeoJSON conversion. Tests in test/cljc/adsb/geo_test.cljc pass on JVM and browser (geo-test: 9 tests/42 assertions; full browser suite 28/146 green). Lint clean for the two files. Committed 5e246da via explicit pathspec.

Delivered adsb.ingest.source (Source protocol open!/fetch!/close! + fn-source stub), adsb.ingest.config (pure validate-feeder-url, fails loudly naming ADSB_ULTRAFEEDER_URL), adsb.ingest.ultrafeeder (http-kit + cheshire Source feeding ->aircraft-batch), and adsb.ingest.poll (~1 Hz loop, log-once-per-state-change, exponential backoff to 30s cap, never dies, feeder status via poll/status). bb test:clj green (52 tests / 216 assertions), bb lint clean. Committed ae678d1 (only my 8 files, pathspec). RESIDUAL: poller is not wired at boot — main.clj is owned by adsb-kh4.1 and untouched here; healthz (adsb-kbm.2) + state store/SSE (adsb-nqf.2) must construct the poller, hold it, and read poll/status. See bead comment for the exact status-atom shape and callback seam.

Pure merge-batch/age-out/stale?/positioned? in adsb.aircraft (seen-at-ms = capture - seen; position retained across position-less updates, other absent fields go absent; retained across missed polls, aged out at 300s silence). Thin atom shell adsb.state wired as the http server's default :state-lookup. cljc+clj tests against the cast; bb test and bb lint clean. Commit b496548.

bb build now produces a deployable artifact. Added src/clj/adsb/main.clj (production -main: reads PORT [default 8280] and ADSB_ULTRAFEEDER_URL from env — URL captured, not yet used, for adsb-nqf.1 to validate; starts adsb.http.server; blocks), build.clj + :build alias (tools.build) that AOTs adsb.main and packages resources/ incl. the shadow release frontend into target/adsb.jar, and a bb build task that runs 'shadow-cljs release app' before cutting the jar. Verified end-to-end from a clean worktree at the commit (1afc7cf): bb build -> target/adsb.jar (~19MB, 0 warnings); java -jar on an ephemeral PORT -> /healthz 200 JSON, / serves index.html (302->/index.html->200), /js/main.js serves the optimized release bundle (1.14MB), unknown icao 404s, clean shutdown. bb test:clj (19 tests/108 assertions, incl. adsb.main-test) and bb lint (0/0) pass. RESIDUAL: the acceptance clause 'serves the live map against a reachable feeder' is NOT met — feeder ingest/aircraft-store wiring (adsb-nqf.1/nqf.2) is not yet connected into the running server, so the map has no live aircraft. Everything else in the acceptance criteria is met. Committed via pathspec in 1afc7cf; note deps.edn/bb.edn also carry a concurrent task's nrepl-alias edits, swept in by whole-file pathspec (preserved, not reverted).

Plausibility layer built and committed (3cd83da). Range gate: adsb.ingest.plausibility/gate-range drops aircraft strictly beyond a configurable horizon (default 400 km / ~216 nm); position-less aircraft pass; nil receiver position disables the gate. Receiver position: adsb.ingest.receiver/resolve-position! once at setup - ADSB_RECEIVER_LAT/LON override wins, else feeder receiver.json (shape verified against the live feeder), else nil + one warn log; coordinates never logged. Jump flagging: >1200 kt sustained implied speed sets :aircraft/position-suspect? true - flagged never dropped/clamped; recomputed per observation (consistent follow-up clears; position-less observation inherits flag with inherited position); composed into adsb.state/apply-batch!. Schema: :aircraft/position-suspect? optional boolean. Privacy tested: coerce carries no trace of r_dst/r_dir; pipeline yields only aircraft-namespaced keys; committed receiver fixture uses synthetic coords. Docs updated (validation-boundaries.md plausibility section + receiver-position sourcing + privacy). bb test (clj 70/287 + cljs browser 37/189) and bb lint clean. Boot wiring for gate-range left as a bead comment for the SSE/integration bead (main.clj owned elsewhere).

Delivered the SSE stream + boot integration. GET /api/stream: snapshot-then-updates at ~1 Hz over http-kit async channels, ': hb' heartbeats every 15s, client registry with on-close removal, drop-and-close slow-consumer policy (full-picture frames bound the backlog). Wire format is adsb.wire (cljc, bidirectional codec, allowlist projection): flat unqualified kebab-case JSON, envelope {at, aircraft[...]}; receiver position / r_dst / r_dir / rssi can never reach the wire by construction - privacy tests over the projection AND over serialized frames from the real fixture pipeline. adsb.main/start! is the one composition root (validate feeder URL loudly, resolve receiver position once, range-gate in the poll callback per nqf.3 handoff, age-out folded into the broadcast tick, live feeder status on /healthz); :dev alias boots adsb.main so bb dev streams. Required http-kit 2.9.0-beta1 (2.8.x never detects HTTP-streaming disconnects - own commit 0d3c7f8). bb test (83 clj tests/341 assertions + 41 cljs/210) and bb lint clean. Feature commit b0b8304, scoped pathspecs only. See bead comments for the full wire spec and decisions.

docs/design-questionnaire.md written and committed (d7fd06e): 15 async-answerable checkbox questions in 6 groups (mood/light, map's voice, density/chrome, motion, emergency loudness, typography/glanceability), each option tagged (N)/(S)/(T) where it echoes a candidate, closing with a how-answers-map-to-candidates note incl. likely hybrids. adsb-bvi.5 notes now reference it and wait on the Overseer's answers.

SSE client delivered. adsb.stream.source: EventSource seam (Connection protocol + connect!, redef-able like adsb.map.maplibre / adsb.ingest.source). adsb.stream: re-frame client — decodes each snapshot/update frame with the shared adsb.wire codec and WHOLESALE-REPLACES :aircraft/picture (icao -> namespaced domain aircraft; never a merge), and drives :stream/connection honestly: :reconnecting while EventSource auto-retries a CONNECTING drop, own exponential backoff (1s->30s cap, reset on open) when the source reaches CLOSED, :down surfaced past 3 attempts while still retrying — so a server restart heals with no page reload. Live EventSource lives in a private atom, not app-db; app-db holds only :aircraft/picture and :stream/connection (subs of the same names). Wired into adsb.core/init!. app-db contract for the map layer documented on adsb-2yu.4. Browser tests fake the seam (snapshot populates picture, update replaces wholesale, :live->:reconnecting->:down->:live lifecycle, backoff grows) under day8.re-frame.test isolation. bb test:cljs 45/228, bb test:clj 83/341, bb lint clean. Commit 2318c22. NOTE: src/cljc/adsb/wire.cljc shows an uncommitted reformat from a concurrent agent — left untouched, not in this commit.

Added adsb.ingest.replay: a fixture-backed Source (open!/fetch!/close!) replaying test/resources/aircraft-sample.json forever through an injected monotonic clock — positions dead-reckon along track at ground speed, seen ages accrue at half the clock so aircraft cross the 60s stale line without reaching the 300s age-out, per-lap reset keeps the picture full. Wired via ADSB_SOURCE=replay (no feeder URL required; ultrafeeder remains default and still fails loud on a missing/bad URL). Unit tests use a fake clock (advancing seen, moving positions, looping, determinism); config/main tests cover source selection. bb test:clj (93 tests, 363 assertions) and bb lint clean. Verified end-to-end: ADSB_SOURCE=replay clojure -M:dev -> /healthz feeder-status ok, SSE snapshot 39 positioned aircraft, later update 38 moved, some stale, zero false position-suspect flags. RESIDUAL: the acceptance 'bb dev renders a moving map' cannot be shown visually yet because the map aircraft layer (adsb-2yu.4) does not exist; the SSE-level proof of moving/aging aircraft is the honest equivalent today. Skipped bb test:cljs to avoid colliding with the concurrent src/cljs agent; my change is clj-only. Commit 0b403f4. Not pushed.

shadow-cljs.edn now carries :deps {:aliases [:cljs]}; CLJS deps + test paths moved to a :cljs alias in deps.edn. malli declared once. bb test:cljs green (45 tests / 228 assertions), bb test:clj green (93/363), bb lint clean.

Coercion surfaces :aircraft/mlat? true for MLAT-derived positions (type=mlat OR non-empty mlat array); true-or-absent marker consistent with on-ground?/position-suspect?; schema, wire allowlist (both directions), docstrings, fixtures comment, and tests updated. bb test:clj + bb lint clean; browser suite verified via force-spawn compile + run-browser-tests.mjs (52 tests, 265 assertions, 0 failures). Commit 7965e32.

All five children closed: Source protocol + poller, state store + staleness, plausibility (range gate + jump flagging), replay Source, MLAT confidence. Backend ingest verified live against the real feeder and feederless via replay.
Both children closed: reitit HTTP server with Malli coercion, SSE fan-out with privacy-allowlisted wire format + boot integration. Verified streaming real aircraft end-to-end.

Imperative aircraft layer landed, commit c7f2672. adsb.map.aircraft-layer: attach! waits on the map's load event, adds the GeoJSON source + a NEUTRAL circle layer through the grown maplibre seam (on-load!/add-source!/add-layer!/set-source-data! — clj->js at the very edge, so tests capture Clojure data), then starts reagent.core/track! over the :aircraft/picture subscription OUTSIDE any component: one picture change = one geo/aircraft-picture->feature-collection + one setData, zero React. Zero-re-render PROOF in adsb.map.aircraft-layer-test: shell mounted for real, 25 :stream/received frames dispatched — 25 setData calls (+1 load flush), map component render count pinned at 1, mount count 1, and unmount stops pushes. Ordering hazard: frames arriving before load land in app-db (wholesale-replaced per adsb-2yu.2), so app-db IS the latest-wins buffer; load flushes the current picture exactly once — tested (2 early frames -> 1 push, latest only). Clock: stale judged at js/Date.now at push time (frame arrival) via redef-able now-ms — the imperative edge owns the clock, the domain takes it as an argument. Feature properties icao/callsign/track/altitude(incl "ground")/emergency/stale all proven to reach the source, so adsb-2yu.5 is pure style-expression work on layer-spec. Browser suite 52/265, JVM 94/370, lint clean. NOTE: bb test:cljs currently fails to connect to the long-running shadow-cljs watch (SERVER INSTANCE OUT OF DATE after a concurrent deps.edn change) — suite was run via 'npx shadow-cljs compile test --force-spawn' + the Playwright driver; the dev watch needs a restart to pick up new deps, left untouched.

Symbol layer driven by MapLibre style expressions in new adsb.map.style ns (data). Icon: two SDF silhouettes (plane + dot for track-less) via seam add-image!, icon-rotate [get track], alignment map. Three-state altitude ramp (absent/ground/numeric) with has-guards; emergency overrides colour+size; stale fades opacity. Click contract dispatches [:aircraft/select icao] through the seam (event/UI owned by dgb.1). Tests + lint green (commit 39b7d1b).

Aircraft selection state + Reagent detail panel. re-frame events :aircraft/select (hard contract w/ 2yu.5) / :aircraft/clear-selection, app-db :aircraft/selected-icao, subs :aircraft/selected-icao + derived :aircraft/selected joined against :aircraft/picture. Panel renders callsign/icao/altitude/speed/track/squawk/vrate/seen-age with absent->em-dash (never 0), suspect+mlat badges, close button. Boundary-4 XSS-proof test passes: hostile callsign renders as escaped text, no img node. Selection survives updates, closes when aircraft leaves picture; dangling icao pruned by 1Hz UI-edge clock tick. 321 cljs + 370 clj assertions green, lint clean, app build clean. Commit bd77c2e.

bb.edn :init parses .env and passes it to the dev task's child processes via :extra-env. Real exported env wins over the file; missing .env is a clean no-op. Verified all three cases with a temporary probe task (since bb dev's ports were occupied). Caught two EDN-reader traps along the way: bb.edn allows neither #"regex" literals nor @deref.

Header (title, live total+positioned counts, UTC clock, connection chip), altitude+status legend overlay reading adsb.map.style constants directly (no drift), connection indicator honest across live/reconnecting/down. Wired into views/app-root. Browser tests green (counts render+update, three indicator states, legend swatches equal style constants); bb test + bb lint clean. Commit b6af0c7.

Aircraft list sidebar shipped (src/cljs/adsb/ui/sidebar.cljs + test). Reagent roster deriving from the same :aircraft/picture sub the map reads — one source of truth. Rows: callsign (icao fallback), three-state altitude (dash for absent, never 0), ground speed; badges for emergency squawk (adsb.geo/emergency?), position-suspect, MLAT. Delegated click dispatches existing [:aircraft/select icao]; selected row marked via :aircraft/selected-icao. Sorts: altitude high->low, callsign A->Z, seen-age freshest-first; absent values sort LAST in every mode (a fact the sky never reported cannot rank against ones it did). Filters: positioned-only and airborne-only (on-ground? true-or-absent semantics) as toggles; state under :ui/* keys with events+subs. ACCEPTANCE DEVIATION: distance sort dropped — it presumed a receiver reference, and the receiver position is PRIVATE by design and never reaches the browser; the only alternative (map-center distance) needs map-state plumbing outside this bead and isn't a true distance-from-antenna. Substituted seen-age sort. Full bb test (82 tests, 388 assertions) + bb lint clean. Commit ba33677 covers the two new files. Root mount in views.cljs and neutral CSS in app.css are applied on disk but left UNSTAGED: both entangle with a concurrent header/legend agent's uncommitted work; committing here would capture their WIP or reference not-yet-committed namespaces (adsb.ui.header/legend). Whoever owns views.cljs/app.css commits the mount.
